blynk_setup_wifi.message0: Blynk WiFi template id %1 name %2 auth %3 ssid %4 password %5 transport %6 server %7 port %8 debug %9
blynk_setup_wifi.tooltip: Connect Blynk through WiFi and automatically run Blynk.run() in loop.

blynk_setup_ethernet.message0: Blynk Ethernet template id %1 name %2 auth %3 server %4 port %5 disable SD pin 4 %6 debug %7
blynk_setup_ethernet.tooltip: Connect Blynk through a W5100/W5500 Ethernet shield and automatically run Blynk.run() in loop.

blynk_run.tooltip: Process Blynk communication. Usually placed in loop; setup blocks add it automatically.

blynk_connected.tooltip: Return true when connected to Blynk Cloud.

blynk_connect.tooltip: Try to connect to Blynk Cloud with a timeout.

blynk_virtual_write.tooltip: Send a value to a Blynk virtual pin.

blynk_sync_virtual.tooltip: Ask Blynk to send the current value of a virtual pin.

blynk_sync_all.tooltip: Ask Blynk to send current values for all widgets.

blynk_resolve_event.tooltip: Resolve one or all logged events with the given event code.

blynk_on_virtual_write.message0: when Blynk writes V %1 as %2 variable %3
blynk_on_virtual_write.tooltip: Handle incoming writes from a Blynk virtual pin.

blynk_on_connected.tooltip: Run code when the device connects to Blynk Cloud.

blynk_param_int.tooltip: Read param.asInt() inside a BLYNK_WRITE handler.

blynk_param_float.tooltip: Read param.asFloat() inside a BLYNK_WRITE handler.

blynk_param_string.tooltip: Read param.asStr() inside a BLYNK_WRITE handler.

blynk_timer_every.tooltip: Create a BlynkTimer interval callback and run the timer automatically in loop.
